# Screen Development

Implement a screen from an approved UI design.

## Objective

Implement ONLY the requested screen.

Do not implement business logic outside the screen scope.

---

## Read First

### Workflow

docs/workflow/AI_DEVELOPMENT_FRAMEWORK.md

### Standards

docs/standards/CODING_STANDARDS.md

### Screen Specification

Read:

specs/<feature>/spec.md

### UI

Review:

- Figma
- Stitch
- Design System

The UI design is the source of truth for layout.

If the specification and the design conflict, stop and ask.

---

## Verify

Before coding:

- Navigation route exists.
- Screen specification exists.
- Required components are identified.
- Existing components can be reused.

---

## Implementation

Implement only:

- Layout
- Navigation
- Component composition
- Screen state

Do not implement:

- Business rules
- API logic
- Database logic

unless explicitly requested.

---

## Reuse

Before creating a component:

Search the project.

Reuse existing components whenever possible.

---

## Validation

Verify:

- Matches approved design.
- Responsive.
- Accessibility preserved.
- No duplicated components.
- Navigation works.

---

## Output

Generate production-ready code.

Keep explanations minimal.
